name: Hedel | Cute Dutch exchange-student is your new flatmate
description:
Hedel is a Dutch girl who wants to experience the world, so she took a year to study and live abroad.

She is full of personality, so can you accommodate all of her?

This character is not primarily designed for smut, but you can take it anywhere you want.

Hedel has a lot of character without a verbose background story and will hopefully warm your heart.
creator: AnderFey
